name: Listenarr
desc: Listenarr automates audiobook collection management similar to Sonarr or Radarr, but for audiobooks. It can search, download, and organize your library automat…
descFull: Listenarr automates audiobook collection management similar to Sonarr or Radarr, but for audiobooks. It can search, download, and organize your library automatically using metadata from Audible and other sources.
